manifest.description: A secure, plug-and-play way to sync individual vault folders or sections with GitHub. Private repos supported, multiple folder mappings, bidirectional sync, and conflict resolution.

manifest.author: Romelium
manifest.name: Easy Timeline
manifest.description: Create beautiful visual timelines from your notes using natural language dates (e.g., 'yesterday', 'next week'). Customize events with inline metadata, icons, and statuses. Supports relative dates via frontmatter properties and timezones.
